name: ipredict-contracts-tests
description: Run unit tests for iPredict Clarity contracts.

scripts.test:fuzz: npx rv . prediction-market invariant --runs 100 && npx rv . ipredict-token invariant --runs 100 && npx rv . referral-registry invariant --runs 100 && npx rv . leaderboard invariant --runs 100
scripts.test:fuzz:quick: npx rv . prediction-market invariant --runs 25 && npx rv . ipredict-token invariant --runs 25 && npx rv . referral-registry invariant --runs 25 && npx rv . leaderboard invariant --runs 25
